---
LastModifyingUser: admin
Test
---
!define TEST_SYSTEM {slim}

!|fixtures.PostRequestFixture|
|url|bodyJson|statusCode?|responseBody?|
|https://api.example.com/users|{"name":"John Doe","email":"john.doe@example.com","mobile":"9876543210","city":"Pune"}|201|{"id":101,"message":"User created successfully"}|
